title: Endpoint.metadata and MessageAction.metadata use serde_json::Value for spec-defined extension bags
description: Endpoint.metadata and MessageAction.metadata are typed as Option<serde_json::Value> rather than a concrete struct or enum of known shapes. A future contributor might add a typed enum of recognized metadata shapes. The spec defines these as type-specific extension bags: the shape depends on the endpoint_type or action_type value, which is an open-ended URI namespace. Adding typed variants for known types would require exhaustive matches and would break deserialization when the server sends an unknown type. Value preserves the data for callers who know the type, rejects nothing, and requires no changes as new extension types are defined.
close_reason: Decision record — current design is correct, no change needed
